description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a fenced property, featuring a main rectangular building with large windows and a flat roof. The house is accompanied by a detached garage with a dark, sloped roof and a paved driveway leading to it. The yard includes a greenhouse, a trampoline, and a small outdoor seating area, all connected by wide, paved walkways. The main entrance is accentuated by a wooden deck, and the property is surrounded by a low, gray fence. The windows are generously sized and arranged in both single and grouped patterns, providing ample natural light. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional amenities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a detached garage, and landscaped outdoor features including a greenhouse and trampoline, all within a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden deck, detached garage, and the arrangement of outdoor amenities within the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the greenhouse, trampoline, and the paved walkways connecting the main house to the garage and yard features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade of the bungalow, the garage, and the driveway with parked cars, as well as the overall property layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the outdoor seating area, the greenhouse, and the extensive paved paths around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single large windows
